description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and light wood exterior cladding. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck, complete with a swimming pool, round outdoor dining table, and a covered patio area. Large windows and glass doors line the back and side facades, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The front includes a double garage, a main entrance with a walkway, and a sunroom or enclosed porch with multiple windows. The property is complemented by a small detached structure, likely a utility shed, and a paved driveway. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces and a clean, contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a light wood exterior, large windows, a spacious deck, pool, and double garage. Features include a covered patio, sunroom, and a detached utility shed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bay window, main deck area, pool, and round outdoor table.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full deck, pool, covered patio, and extensive glass doors and windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, deck, and the rear of the garage and utility shed.
description_view_3: Front view with the double garage, main entrance, walkway, and sunroom with multiple windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and bay window on front facade
